title: Shipments
subtitle: Manage and track your shipments in one place

empty.switch_tab: Create a shipment or switch to another tab.
empty.created_hint: Get started by creating your first shipment using the form above.
empty.price_requested_hint: Once you request pricing for a shipment, it will appear here.
empty.priced_hint: Shipments awaiting transporter quotes will appear here once priced.
empty.accepted_hint: Your accepted shipments and their final quotes will be listed here.

detail.not_found: The shipment you're looking for doesn't exist or an error occurred.

containers.title: Containers
containers.assignment_desc: Manage containers assigned to this shipment. Search and assign containers or remove existing assignments.
containers.add_hint: Add containers from your list to this shipment

quotes.title: Transporter Quotes
quotes.select_hint: Select quotes to accept for this shipment
quotes.will_appear: Transporter quotes will appear here once submitted.
quotes.accept_confirm: Are you sure you want to accept {{count}} selected transporter quote(s) for shipment #{{id}}?

remove_container.title: Remove container
remove_container.message: Unassign this container from the shipment? You can assign it again later.

price.success_message: Your price request has been successfully submitted. You will be notified once a response is received.

delete.title: Delete Shipment
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete shipment #{{id}}? This action cannot be undone.
delete.warning_containers: ⚠️ This shipment has {{count}} assigned container(s). They will be unassigned.
delete.warning_containers_full: ⚠️ Warning: This shipment has {{count}} assigned container(s). They will be unassigned from this shipment.

create_form.title: Create New Shipment
create_form.subtitle: Fill in the shipment details to create a new shipment

sidebar.title: Shipments
sidebar.empty: No shipments yet. Create one to get started.

assign_table.title: Container Assignment
assign_table.showing_available: Showing {{count}} available containers • Type to search
assign_table.select_shipment_desc: Search and assign available containers to this shipment.
assign_table.no_shipment_desc: Select a shipment to manage containers.
assign_table.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove container {{number}} from this shipment?

documents.title: Documents
documents.select_hint: Select a shipment from the sidebar to view or upload documents
documents.manage_files: Manage files related to this shipment
documents.click_to_upload: Click to upload or drag and drop
documents.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Please upload PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, or PNG files.
documents.file_too_large: File size exceeds 10MB limit. Please choose a smaller file.

uploaded_docs.title: Uploaded documents
uploaded_docs.hint: Preview or download documents. Click Preview to view in the app, or Download to save the file.

priced.title: Priced Shipments
priced.subtitle: All priced shipments with transporter quotes
priced.returning_fee: A flat fee of 10,000 ETB is added when at least 1 container is returning. This fee is included in the total price.
priced.no_quotes: No quotes found for this shipment.
priced.accept_dialog_message: Are you sure you want to accept {{count}} selected transporter quote(s)?
priced.accept_dialog_detail: This action will accept all ship items from the selected transporter(s) for shipment #{{id}}.

accepted.title: Accepted Ship Items
accepted.subtitle: Accepted transporter quotes for this shipment
accepted.select_shipment: Select a shipment to view accepted ship items.
accepted.no_found: No accepted ship items found for this shipment.
accepted.showing_containers: Showing {{count}} container(s) for this ship item

tracking.title: Track Shipment
tracking.not_available: Tracking data is not available yet for this shipment.
tracking.no_data_desc: Live tracking will be available once the shipment is accepted and trucks are assigned.
tracking.no_trucks_desc: Truck assignments and live GPS tracking will appear here once the shipment is accepted and trucks are dispatched.
tracking.could_not_retrieve: The shipment data could not be retrieved.

quotes_detail.title: Shipment #{{id}} - Quotes
quotes_detail.subtitle: Review and accept quotes from transporters for this shipment
quotes_detail.error_loading: Error loading quotes. Please try again.
quotes_detail.no_quotes: No quotes found for this shipment.
quotes_detail.compare_quotes: Compare quotes from different transporters and accept the best offer
quotes_detail.accept_confirm: Are you sure you want to accept this quote from Transporter #{{id}}?
